Join now to work on your automation skills, connect to other builders and perhaps you’ll earn a spot in our [May Community Livestream](https://luma.com/n8n-events)! **![:backhand_index_pointing_right:](https://emoji.discourse-cdn.com/twitter/backhand_index_pointing_right.png?v=15)[Learn more here](https://n8n.notion.site/community-challenge?source=copy_link)** # [Querying n8n Workflow Credentials with AI Agent](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384) [Tutorials](https://community.n8n.io/c/tutorials/28) [English 🇬🇧](https://community.n8n.io/c/tutorials/english/29) You have selected **0** posts. [select all](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384) [cancel selecting](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384) 879 views 6 likes 2 links [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/jim_le/48/45558_2.png)3](https://community.n8n.io/u/Jim_Le "Jim_Le") [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/brown5tick/48/119117_2.png)2](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick "brown5tick") [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/sirdavidoff/48/2423_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/sirdavidoff "sirdavidoff") read 4 min [Jun 2024](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/1 "Jump to the first post") 1 / 6 Jun 2024 [Sep 2025](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/6) ## post by Jim\_Le on Jun 13, 2024 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/jim_le/48/45558_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) [Jim\_Le](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) Top Supporter 3 [Jun 2024](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384 "Post date") [![Frame 2](https://europe1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/optimized/3X/d/a/dab7b0dfa3e3a4a5261286dae79c4be8fc798848_2_690x382.png)\\ Frame 2800×444 233 KB](https://europe1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/original/3X/d/a/dab7b0dfa3e3a4a5261286dae79c4be8fc798848.png "Frame 2") **Ever wondered which of your n8n workflows are using which credentials?** **Just getting started with AI agents and want to use them for everything?** Well, you’ll in luck! Here’s a neat little trick which uses an AI agent as a search interface over your n8n workflows and their credentials. In this example, you’ll learn: - Utilising the n8n API with HTTP node pagination example - Creating ephemeral SQLite databases with Code node - Building AI Agent with tools - in particular, an SQL tool which uses an SQLite database. If you like n8n & AI, be sure to [check out my other AI posts in the forum](http://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le/activity)! ## [Heading link](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384\#p-150279-workflow-1) Workflow [![Screenshot 2024-06-13 075933](https://europe1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/optimized/3X/9/5/95e2b1217033e66463098083b782a16b5a2e80a9_2_690x331.png)\\ Screenshot 2024-06-13 0759331560×750 69.3 KB](https://europe1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/original/3X/9/5/95e2b1217033e66463098083b782a16b5a2e80a9.png "Screenshot 2024-06-13 075933") n8n.io - Workflow Automation We’ve been busy ✨ ## How likely are you to recommend n8n to a friend or colleague? n8n AI RAG knowledge assistantMulti-agent research workflowSummarize emails with AILead qualification and call schedulingDaily weather reportDaily AI news digestYouTube video chaptersInvoice processing pipeline 💡 Double-click a node to see its settings, or paste this workflow's code into n8n to import it 4 ​ 879 views 6 likes 2 links [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/jim_le/48/45558_2.png)3](https://community.n8n.io/u/Jim_Le "Jim_Le") [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/brown5tick/48/119117_2.png)2](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick "brown5tick") [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/sirdavidoff/48/2423_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/sirdavidoff "sirdavidoff") read 4 min ## post by sirdavidoff on Jun 13, 2024 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/sirdavidoff/48/2423_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/sirdavidoff) [sirdavidoff](https://community.n8n.io/u/sirdavidoff) n8n Team [Jun 2024](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/2 "Post date") Love this idea, Jim! People often use n8n to make up for missing features in other tools, and you’re doing it with n8n itself. Very meta ![:slight_smile:](http://community.n8n.io/images/emoji/twitter/slight_smile.png?v=12) This would be amazing as a workflow template if you haven’t submitted one already. 1 ​ ## post by Jim\_Le on Jun 14, 2024 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/jim_le/48/45558_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) [Jim\_Le](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) Top Supporter [Jun 2024](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/3 "Post date") Thanks [@sirdavidoff](https://community.n8n.io/u/sirdavidoff). Ha I didn’t initially look at it that way but now you mentioned it… yes, it is all very meta! Really enjoying using the AI nodes btw - makes it really easy to test out things like this. Yes, I’m definitely looking to submit a few templates soon ![:crossed_fingers:](http://community.n8n.io/images/emoji/twitter/crossed_fingers.png?v=12) ​ 1 year later ## post by brown5tick on Sep 12, 2025 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/brown5tick/48/119117_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick) [brown5tick](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick) 1 [Sep 2025](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/4 "Post date") Hey [@Jim\_Le](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le), loving the ephemeral DB technique! Am I right to conclude then that the DBs are _not_ persistent across executions (as the name suggests)? _**Edit:** Checked. It looks like the DBs do persist across executions. I guess there are implications then on the volume of data that the instance is going to accrue (for n8n Cloud plans) including:_ - _Increased execution log pruning_ - _Increased likelihood of out of memory incidents._ Can anyone advise if it’s possible to check the instance memory status during runtime? It doesn’t look like the API supports it. ​ - [Workflow Memory Error Due to Image Size - Practically Understanding Cloud Data Management](http://community.n8n.io/t/workflow-memory-error-due-to-image-size-practically-understanding-cloud-data-management/166086/7) ## post by Jim\_Le on Sep 15, 2025 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/jim_le/48/45558_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) [Jim\_Le](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) Top Supporter [Sep 2025](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/5 "Post date") Hey [@brown5tick](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick) Just wanted to add a slight but important correction that whilst the sqlite instance might appear to persist across executions, it’s really all in memory and does remove itself eventually when memory management/garbage collection kicks in and no-one should really expect or led to believe otherwise. Also note that the code node does not have write access to disk and it actually uses a virtual filesystem if I recall correctly. To answer your question definitively, code node sqlite instances are not persistent across executions. > Can anyone advise if it’s possible to check the instance memory status during runtime? > > For self-hosted, you can use the `/metrics` endpoint ( [Monitoring \| n8n Docs](https://docs.n8n.io/hosting/logging-monitoring/monitoring/#metrics)) For cloud, unfortunately not possible. You can check out the cloud instance limits in the docs - [Cloud data management \| n8n Docs](https://docs.n8n.io/manage-cloud/cloud-data-management/#memory-limits-on-each-cloud-plan) . Perhaps if you can run your workflow locally and set the docker container specs to match those of the cloud plan, this may help you diagnose any memory limit issues you’re running into. ```yaml services: n8n: ..., deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '0.01' memory: 320m ``` 1 ​ ## post by brown5tick on Sep 16, 2025 [![](https://dub1.discourse-cdn.com/n8n/user_avatar/community.n8n.io/brown5tick/48/119117_2.png)](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick) [brown5tick](https://community.n8n.io/u/brown5tick) [Sep 2025](https://community.n8n.io/t/querying-n8n-workflow-credentials-with-ai-agent/48384/6 "Post date") Thanks for the feedback, [@Jim\_Le](https://community.n8n.io/u/jim_le) ​ Reply ### Related topics | Topic | Replies | Views | Activity | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Doubt AI Agent: Tool: Call n8n Workflow Tool](https://community.n8n.io/t/doubt-ai-agent-tool-call-n8n-workflow-tool/80069)
